seoTitle: West Kentish vs West Montagu — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Kentish and West Montagu. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Kentish vs West Montagu: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Kentish and West Montagu.
heading: West Kentish vs West Montagu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Kentish, Tasmania and West Montagu, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Kentish has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to West Montagu (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Kentish or West Montagu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Kentish has a flood risk score of 33/100, while West Montagu scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Kentish scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. West Montagu scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Kentish or West Montagu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Kentish has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
